                            style: {
                                text: avgText,
                                fontSize: 12,
                                fill: '#999',
                                textAlign: 'center',
                            },
                        },
                        {
                            type: 'text',
                            left: 'center',
                            top: shiftedPct(0.47, h),
                            style: {
                                text: kind === 'price' ? '金币' : 'EXP',
                                fontSize: 12,
                                fill: '#999',
                                textAlign: 'center',
                            },
                        },
                    ];
                } else {
                    option.graphic = [{
                        type: 'text',
                        left: 'center',
                        top: shiftedPct(0.50, h),
                        style: {
                            text: '暂无渔获',
                            fontSize: 14,
                            fill: '#aaa',
                            textAlign: 'center',
                        },
                    }];
                }
                return option;
            }

            function updateSummary(bounds, agg) {
                const rangeText = formatRangeLabel(bounds);
                const priceText = Utils.formatNumber(Math.round(agg.totalPrice).toString());
                const expText = Math.round(agg.totalExp).toString();
                summaryDiv.textContent =
                    `统计区间：${rangeText} · 共 ${agg.totalCount} 条 · ` +
                    `金币 ${priceText} · 经验 ${expText} EXP`;
            }

            function updateSummaryError(message) {
                summaryDiv.textContent = message;
            }

            function updateInputLimits() {
                if (!startInput || !endInput) return;
                const now = floorToHour(Date.now());
                const { minMs } = getFishTimeBounds();
                const minValue = toDatetimeLocalValue(minMs);
                const maxValue = toDatetimeLocalValue(now);
                startInput.min = minValue;
                startInput.max = maxValue;
                endInput.min = minValue;
                endInput.max = maxValue;
            }

            function onRangeInputChange() {
                if (syncingInputs) return;
                refresh();
            }

            const chartLoadingOpt = {
                text: '加载中',
                color: '#5470c6',
                textColor: '#666',
                maskColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85)',
                fontSize: 13,
                spinnerRadius: 10,
                lineWidth: 3,
            };

            function showChartsLoading() {
                priceChart?.showLoading(chartLoadingOpt);
                expChart?.showLoading(chartLoadingOpt);
            }

            function hideChartsLoading() {
                priceChart?.hideLoading();
                expChart?.hideLoading();
            }

            function renderCharts(bounds, agg, animate = false) {
                updateSummary(bounds, agg);
                const priceOpt = buildDonutOption('price', agg, bounds, priceChartDiv.clientHeight);
                const expOpt = buildDonutOption('exp', agg, bounds, expChartDiv.clientHeight);
                if (animate) {
                    chartAnimating = true;
                    priceChart.resize();
                    expChart.resize();
                    priceChart.clear();
                    expChart.clear();
                    setTimeout(() => { chartAnimating = false; }, CHART_ANIM_MS + 200);
                }
                priceChart.setOption(priceOpt, { notMerge: true, lazyUpdate: false });
                expChart.setOption(expOpt, { notMerge: true, lazyUpdate: false });
            }

            function refresh(withLoading = false) {
                updateInputLimits();
                const bounds = getRangeBounds();
                if (!bounds) {
                    updateSummaryError('请选择有效的开始与结束时间');
                    hideChartsLoading();
                    return;
                }
                if (bounds.startMs >= bounds.endMs) {
                    updateSummaryError('开始时间必须早于结束时间');
                    hideChartsLoading();
                    return;
                }
                const doRender = () => {
                    const agg = aggregateByBounds(bounds);
                    renderCharts(bounds, agg, withLoading);
                    if (withLoading) {
                        setTimeout(hideChartsLoading, 120);
                    }
                };
                if (withLoading && priceChart) {
                    showChartsLoading();
                    requestAnimationFrame(doRender);
                } else {
                    doRender();
                }
            }

            function construct() {
                const inputStyle = 'width: 168px; font-size: 13px;';

                const settingsDiv = Ui.div({
                    style: 'display: flex; flex-wrap: nowrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center; padding: 8px; overflow: hidden;',
                });

                rangeSelect = Ui.select({
                    options: {
                        '12 小时': { hours: 12 },
                        '24 小时': { hours: 24 },
                        '48 小时': { hours: 48 },
                        '全部': { hours: 1e9 },
                    },
                    default: '12 小时',
                    onchange: (value) => {
                        config.rangeHours = value.hours;
                        applyPresetToInputs(value.hours);
                        refresh();
                    },
                }, { className: 'lll_input_select', style: 'width: auto; min-width: 88px; flex-shrink: 0;' });
                settingsDiv.appendChild(rangeSelect);

                startInput = Ui.elem('input', {
                    className: 'lll_input',
                    type: 'datetime-local',
                    step: '3600',
                    style: inputStyle,
                });
                startInput.onchange = onRangeInputChange;
                settingsDiv.appendChild(startInput);

                settingsDiv.appendChild(Ui.div({
                    style: 'color: #888; flex-shrink: 0;',
                    textContent: '~',
                }));

                endInput = Ui.elem('input', {
                    className: 'lll_input',
                    type: 'datetime-local',
                    step: '3600',
                    style: inputStyle,
                });
                endInput.onchange = onRangeInputChange;
                settingsDiv.appendChild(endInput);

                settingsDiv.appendChild(Ui.div({ style: 'flex: 1; min-width: 8px;' }));

                const refreshBtn = Ui.button('刷新');
                refreshBtn.onclick = () => refresh();
                settingsDiv.appendChild(refreshBtn);

                summaryDiv = Ui.div({
                    style: 'padding: 0 8px 6px; font-size: 13px; color: #666; line-height: 1.5;',
                });

                priceChartDiv = Ui.div({ style: 'flex: 1; height: 100%; min-width: 0;' });
                expChartDiv = Ui.div({ style: 'flex: 1; height: 100%; min-width: 0;' });

                const chartsRow = Ui.div({
                    style: 'display: flex; flex: 1; min-height: 0; gap: 8px; padding: 0 8px 8px;',
                }, [priceChartDiv, expChartDiv]);

                return Ui.div({
                    style: 'display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;',
                }, [settingsDiv, summaryDiv, chartsRow]);
            }

            function onInit() {
                config = { rangeHours: 12 };
                applyPresetToInputs(12);
                priceChart = echarts.init(priceChartDiv);
                expChart = echarts.init(expChartDiv);
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => refresh(true));
                });
                const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        if (chartAnimating) return;
                        priceChart?.resize();
                        expChart?.resize();
                    });
                });
                observer.observe(priceChartDiv);
                observer.observe(expChartDiv);
            }

            function onResize() {
                if (chartAnimating) return;
                priceChart?.resize();
                expChart?.resize();
            }

            function onShow() {
                refresh(true);
            }

            return {
                content: construct(),
                onInit: onInit,
                onResize: onResize,
                onShow: onShow,
            };
        }

        recordPanel() {
            var table;

            const filters = {};
            const defaultGroupBy = '种类';
            const groupBy = {
                '无': null,
                '地点': 'regionAbbr',
                '评级': item => Rarity.rarityName[Rarity.scoreToRarity(item.score)],
                '种类': 'name',
                '时间': item => Utils.formatDate(item.time, 'D'),
            };

            function processHistoryData() {
                const data = Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish).map(fish => {
                    return {
                        time: fish.caughtAt,
                        fishId: fish.fishId,
                        name: GameData.fishData[fish.fishId].name,
                        weight: fish.weight,
                        size: fish.size,
                        regionAbbr: GameData.regionData[fish.regionId].abbr,
                        price: FishKeepHistory.computePriceByFish(fish),
                        exp: FishKeepHistory.computeExpByFish(fish),
                        score: fish.score,
                        rawData: fish,
                    }
                }).filter(fish => {
                    for (const f of Object.values(filters)) {
                        if (!f(fish)) return false;
                    }
                    return true;
                });
                return data;
            }

            function constructTable() {
                const data = processHistoryData();
                const tableColumns = [
                    { title: '时间', key: 'time', render: t => Utils.formatDate(t, 'dt') },
                    { title: '种类', key: 'name' },
                    { title: '价格', key: 'price', render: v => v?.toFixed(0) ?? '' },
                    { title: '经验', key: 'exp', render: v => v?.toFixed(1) ?? '' },
                    { title: '重量', key: 'weight', render: v => Utils.formatWeight(v) },
                    { title: '体长', key: 'size', render: v => `${v.toFixed(1)}cm` },
                    { title: '地点', key: 'regionAbbr' },
                    {
                        title: '评分',
                        key: 'score',
                        render: score => {
                            const rarity = Rarity.scoreToRarity(score);
                            let h = 0, s = 50, l = 100;
                            if (rarity == -1) s = 0, l = 85;
                            if (rarity == 0) s = 0;
                            if (rarity == 1) h = 100;
                            if (rarity == 2) h = 200;
                            if (rarity == 3) h = 35, s = 70;
                            if (rarity == 4) h = 0;
                            const bgHsl = `hsl(${h}, ${s}%, ${l * 0.9}%)`;
                            const textHsl = `hsl(${h}, ${s}%, ${l * 0.35}%)`;
                            return `<div style="background-color: ${bgHsl}; color: ${textHsl}; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; display: inline-block; font-size: 11px;">${score.toFixed(2)}%</div>`;
                        }
                    }
                ];

                const tableContainer = Ui.div({ style: 'margin: 10px; overflow: auto; flex: 1;' });
                table = new GroupableTable({
                    el: tableContainer,
                    columns: tableColumns,
                    data: data,
                    groupBy: groupBy[defaultGroupBy],
                });
                return tableContainer;
            }

            function settingsSection() {
                const settingsDiv = Ui.div({ style: 'display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 10px;' });

                const timeRangeSelect = Ui.select({
                    options: {
                        '无': '无',
                        '地点': '地点',
                        '评级': '评级',
                        '种类': '种类',
                        '时间': '时间',
                    },
                    default: defaultGroupBy,
                    onchange: (value) => {
                        table.refresh({ groupBy: groupBy[value] });
                    },
                }, { style: 'width:auto' });
                settingsDiv.appendChild(Ui.div({ style: 'display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; align-items: center;' }, [
                    Ui.div({ textContent: '分组依据' }),
                    timeRangeSelect,
                ]));


                const refreshTable = () => {
                    table.refresh({ data: processHistoryData() });
                };

                const fishNameFilterInput = Ui.elem('input', { type: 'text', style: 'width: 120px;' });
                fishNameFilterInput.onchange = () => {
                    const val = fishNameFilterInput.value;
                    filters.name = fish => {
                        if (val == '') return true;
                        if (fish.name.includes(val)) return true;
                        return false;
                    };
                    refreshTable();
                }
                settingsDiv.appendChild(Ui.div({ style: 'display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; align-items: center;' }, [
                    Ui.div({ textContent: '鱼种筛选' }),
                    fishNameFilterInput,
                ]));

                const regionFilterInput = Ui.elem('input', { type: 'text', style: 'width: 120px;' });
                regionFilterInput.onchange = () => {
                    const val = regionFilterInput.value;
                    filters.region = fish => {
                        if (val == '') return true;
                        if (fish.regionAbbr.includes(val)) return true;
                        return false;
                    };
                    refreshTable();
                }
                settingsDiv.appendChild(Ui.div({ style: 'display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; align-items: center;' }, [
                    Ui.div({ textContent: '地点筛选' }),
                    regionFilterInput,
                ]));


                const clearFilterBtn = Ui.button('清空筛选');
                clearFilterBtn.onclick = () => {
                    delete filters.name;
                    fishNameFilterInput.value = '';
                    delete filters.region;
                    regionFilterInput.value = '';
                    refreshTable();
                };
                settingsDiv.appendChild(clearFilterBtn);

                // const applyFilterBtn = Ui.button('应用筛选');
                // applyFilterBtn.onclick = refreshTable;
                // settingsDiv.appendChild(applyFilterBtn);

                return settingsDiv;
            }

            function construct() {
                const div = Ui.div({ style: 'display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;' });

                const settingsDiv = Ui.div({ style: 'margin: 10px 10px -10px;' });
                new CollapseSection({
                    title: '分组/筛选',
                    isExpanded: false,
                    content: settingsSection(),
                }).mount(settingsDiv);
                div.appendChild(settingsDiv);
                div.appendChild(constructTable());

                return div;
            }
            function onInit() {
            }
            function onResize() {
            }

            return {
                content: construct(),
                onInit: onInit,
                onResize: onResize,
            }
        }

        statPanel() {
            var offsetHistoryChart = new class {
                chart = null;
                chartDiv = null;

                /**
                 * 构建钓场区域 markArea（直接追加到 series 数组）
                 */
                buildRegionAreas(series, data) {
                    let beginTime = new Date(0);
                    let endTime = new Date(0);
                    let regionId = null;
                    let spotId = null;
                    const addRegion = () => {
                        if (!regionId || endTime <= beginTime) return;
                        const getHash = (s) => {
                            let hash = 0;
                            if (s.length === 0) return hash;
                            for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
                                const chr = s.charCodeAt(i);
                                hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + chr;
                                hash |= 0;
                            }
                            return (Math.abs(hash) % 32768) / 32768;
                        };
                        const region = GameData.regionData[regionId];
                        const abbr = region.abbr + (spotId ? '' : ' (船)');
                        const name = region.name + (spotId ? ` (岸钓: ${region.spots[spotId].name})` : ' (船钓)');
                        series.push({
                            name: '钓场',
                            type: 'line',
                            xAxisIndex: 0,
                            yAxisIndex: 0,
                            markArea: {
                                itemStyle: {
                                    color: Utils.HSVtoRGB(getHash(regionId), 0.5, 1, 0.3).rgba,
                                },
                                data: [[
                                    {
                                        name: abbr,
                                        xAxis: beginTime,
                                        data: {
                                            regionId, spotId, name,
                                            color: Utils.HSVtoRGB(getHash(regionId), 0.5, 1).rgb,
                                        }
                                    },
                                    { xAxis: endTime }
                                ]],
                                label: { show: true },
                                blur: { itemStyle: { opacity: 0.75 } },
                                animation: true,
                            },
                        });
                    };
                    data.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time).forEach(fish => {
                        if (fish.regionId != regionId || fish.spotId != spotId) {
                            addRegion();
                            regionId = fish.regionId;
                            spotId = fish.spotId;
                            beginTime = fish.time;
                        }
                        endTime = fish.time;
                    });
                    addRegion();
                }

                getChartOption() {
                    const rawData = Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish).sort((a, b) => a.caughtAt - b.caughtAt);
                    const data = [];
                    rawData.forEach(fish => {
                        const time = new Date(fish.caughtAt);
                        if (Rarity.isLimit(fish.score)) return;
                        const q = Utils.phiInv(fish.score / 100);
                        data.push({
                            time: time,
                            fishId: fish.fishId,
                            regionId: fish.regionId,
                            spotId: fish.spotId,
                            score: fish.score / 100,
                            q: q,
                        });
                    });

                    const range = 100;
                    let sum = 0, tot = 0;
                    const points = [];
                    for (let i = 0, offset = 0; i < data.length; ++i) {
                        sum += data[i].q, ++tot;
                        if (i < range) continue;
                        sum -= data[i - range].q, --tot;
                        const cur = sum / tot;
                        if (i == range) offset = cur;
                        offset += (cur - offset) * 0.1;
                        points.push([data[i].time, offset, data[i]]);
                    }

                    const series = [];
                    series.push({
                        name: '',
                        type: 'line',
                        xAxisIndex: 0,
                        yAxisIndex: 0,
                        data: points,
                        showSymbol: false,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: '#6c81ae',
                            width: 2,
                        },
                        smooth: true,
                    });
                    this.buildRegionAreas(series, data);

                    const option = {
                        tooltip: {
                            trigger: 'axis',
                            formatter: param => {
                                if (param.length < 1) return;
                                const data = param[0].data[2];
                                const y = param[0].data[1].toFixed(2);

                                const region = GameData.regionData[data.regionId];
                                const name = region.name + (data.spotId ? ` (岸钓: ${region.spots[data.spotId].name})` : ' (船钓)');

                                const time = Utils.formatDate(data.time, 'dt');
                                return ChartTooltip.custom(time, Ui.div({
                                    innerHTML: `
                                    <div style="margin: 0;line-height:1;">
                                        <span style="font-size:14px;color:#6d6e73;font-weight:900;">${name}</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div style="margin: 6px 0 0;line-height:1;">
                                        <span style="font-size:14px;color:#6d6e73;font-weight:900;">评级偏移: ${y}</span>
                                    </div>
                                `}));
                            }
                        },
                        grid: [{ top: 35, bottom: 65, left: 45, right: 25 }],
                        dataZoom: [
                            {
                                type: 'slider',
                                xAxisIndex: 0,
                                start: 0, end: 100,
                                height: 24, bottom: 10,
                                filterMode: 'none',
                                brushSelect: false,
                                showDataShadow: false,
                                labelFormatter: value => Utils.formatDate(value, 'dt'),
                            },
                            {
                                type: 'inside',
                                xAxisIndex: 0,
                            }
                        ],
                        xAxis: [
                            {
                                type: 'time',
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            }
                        ],
                        yAxis: [
                            {
                                type: 'value',
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            }
                        ],
                        series: series,
                    };
                    return option;
                }
                updateChart() {
                    const option = this.getChartOption();
                    this.chart.setOption(option);
                }
                init() {
                    this.chart = echarts.init(this.chartDiv);
                    this.updateChart();
                    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
                        window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (!Array.isArray(entries) || !entries.length) {
                                return;
                            }
                            this.chart.resize();
                        });
                    });
                    observer.observe(this.chartDiv);
                }
            }

            var currentOffsetChart = new class {
                chart = null;
                chartDiv = null;

                getChartOption() {
                    const computed = ScoreOffsetCalc.compute(Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish));
                    if (!computed) {
                        return {};
                    }

                    const { rerollCount, offset } = computed;
                    const scoreList = ScoreOffsetCalc.sortedScoreList;
                    const line = [];
                    const step = 400;
                    for (let i = 0; i <= step; i += 1) {
                        const x = i / step;
                        const y = Utils.phi(Utils.phiInv(Math.pow(x, 1 / rerollCount)) + offset);
                        line.push([x, y]);
                    }

                    const series = [];
                    series.push({
                        type: 'scatter',
                        xAxisIndex: 0,
                        yAxisIndex: 0,
                        data: scoreList,
                        symbolSize: 3,
                        itemStyle: {
                            color: '#6c81ae',
                            opacity: 0.8,
                            borderColor: '#fff',
                            borderWidth: 0.1
                        },
                    });
                    series.push({
                        type: 'line',
                        xAxisIndex: 0,
                        yAxisIndex: 0,
                        data: line,
                        showSymbol: false,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: '#f09621',
                            width: 2,
                        },
                        smooth: true,
                    });

                    const option = {
                        grid: [
                            { top: 35, bottom: 30, left: 40, right: 25 },
                        ],
                        xAxis: [
                            {
                                type: 'value',
                                min: 0, max: 1,
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            },
                        ],
                        yAxis: [
                            {
                                name: '评分 (%)',
                                type: 'value',
                                min: 0, max: 1,
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                axisLabel: {
                                    formatter: v => {
                                        return `${v * 100}`;
                                    }
                                },
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            },
                        ],
                        series: series,
                    };
                    return option;
                }
                updateChart() {
                    const option = this.getChartOption();
                    this.chart.setOption(option);
                }
                init() {
                    this.chart = echarts.init(this.chartDiv);
                    this.updateChart();
                    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
                        window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (!Array.isArray(entries) || !entries.length) {
                                return;
                            }
                            this.chart.resize();
                        });
                    });
                    observer.observe(this.chartDiv);
                }
            }

            function offsetChartSection() {
                const container = Ui.div({ style: `display: flex; flex-direction: column; margin: 10px 10px 0;` });

                offsetHistoryChart.chartDiv = Ui.div({ style: `width: 100%; height: 300px;` });
                currentOffsetChart.chartDiv = Ui.div({ style: `width: 100%; height: 300px;` });

                new CollapseSection({
                    title: '历史偏移',
                    isExpanded: false,
                    content: offsetHistoryChart.chartDiv,
                }).mount(container);

                new CollapseSection({
                    title: '当前偏移',
                    isExpanded: false,
                    content: currentOffsetChart.chartDiv,
                }).mount(container);

                return container;
            }

            var scoreWeightChart = new class {
                chart = null;
                chartDiv = null;

                getChartOption() {
                    FishPredictor.fit(Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish));
                    const rawData = FishPredictor.rawData;
                    const model = FishPredictor.model;
                    const scatter = rawData.map(fish => {
                        return [fish.y, fish.raw.score / 100, fish.valid];
                    });
                    const deltaScatter = rawData.map(fish => {
                        const w = fish.y; // 重量分位
                        const expectedY = Math.pow(Math.max(w - model.b, 0), 1 / model.a);
                        const y = FishPredictor.model.mu - FishPredictor.model.k * Math.SQRT2 * Utils.erfcInv(2 * fish.raw.score / 100);
                        return [w, y - expectedY, fish.valid];
                    });

                    const line = [];
                    const step = 100, regionCount = 3;
                    for (let i = 0; i <= step; i += 1) {
                        const x = i / step;
                        const y = FishPredictor.predictByWeightRatio(x).scoreInvCDF(0.5);
                        line.push([x, y]);
                    }

                    const series = [
                        {
                            type: 'scatter',
                            xAxisIndex: 0,
                            yAxisIndex: 0,
                            data: scatter,
                            symbolSize: 3,
                            itemStyle: {
                                color: param => {
                                    const valid = param.data[2];
                                    return valid ? '#6c81ae' : '#e8582f';
                                },
                                opacity: 0.8,
                                borderColor: '#fff',
                                borderWidth: 0.1
                            },
                        },
                        {
                            type: 'scatter',
                            xAxisIndex: 1,
                            yAxisIndex: 1,
                            data: deltaScatter,
                            symbolSize: 3,
                            itemStyle: {
                                color: param => {
                                    const valid = param.data[2];
                                    return valid ? '#6c81ae' : '#e8582f';
                                },
                                opacity: 0.8,
                                borderColor: '#fff',
                                borderWidth: 0.1
                            },
                        },
                        {
                            type: 'line',
                            xAxisIndex: 0,
                            yAxisIndex: 0,
                            data: line,
                            showSymbol: false,
                            lineStyle: {
                                color: '#f09621',
                                width: 2,
                            },
                            smooth: true,
                        },
                    ];

                    for (let r = -regionCount, prev; r <= regionCount; ++r) {
                        const s = Utils.phi(r);
                        const region = [], cur = [];
                        for (let i = 0; i <= step; i += 1) {
                            const x = i / step;
                            const y = FishPredictor.predictByWeightRatio(x).scoreInvCDF(s);
                            const prevY = prev?.[i] ?? 0;
                            cur.push(y);
                            region.push([x, y - prevY]);
                        }
                        prev = cur;
                        const opacity = Utils.clamp(1 - Math.abs(r - 0.5) / regionCount, 0, 1);
                        series.push({
                            type: 'line',
                            xAxisIndex: 0,
                            yAxisIndex: 0,
                            data: region,
                            stack: 'ss',
                            areaStyle: {
                                color: '#f09621',
                                opacity: 0.4 * opacity,
                            },
                            showSymbol: false,
                            lineStyle: { width: 0 },
                            smooth: true,
                            silent: true,
                        });
                    }

                    const option = {
                        grid: [
                            { top: 30, bottom: '38%', left: 40, right: 30 },
                            { top: '70%', bottom: 30, left: 40, right: 30 },
                        ],
                        xAxis: [
                            {
                                name: '重量分位',
                                nameLocation: 'end',
                                nameRotate: -90,
                                type: 'value',
                                min: 0, max: 1,
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            },
                            {
                                type: 'value',
                                min: 0, max: 1,
                                gridIndex: 1,
                                axisLabel: { show: false },
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            }
                        ],
                        yAxis: [
                            {
                                name: '评分 (%)',
                                type: 'value',
                                min: 0, max: 1,
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                axisLabel: {
                                    formatter: v => {
                                        return `${v * 100}`;
                                    }
                                },
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            },
                            {
                                name: '残差',
                                nameLocation: 'start',
                                type: 'value',
                                min: -0.2, max: 0.2,
                                gridIndex: 1,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            }
                        ],
                        series: series,
                    };
                    return option;
                }
                updateChart() {
                    const option = this.getChartOption();
                    this.chart.setOption(option);
                }
                init() {
                    this.chart = echarts.init(this.chartDiv);
                    this.updateChart();
                    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
                        window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (!Array.isArray(entries) || !entries.length) {
                                return;
                            }
                            this.chart.resize();
                        });
                    });
                    observer.observe(this.chartDiv);
                }
            }

            function scoreWeightChartSection() {
                const div = Ui.div({ style: `display: flex; height: 400px; margin: 10px;` });

                scoreWeightChart.chartDiv = Ui.div({ style: `width: 100%;` });
                div.appendChild(scoreWeightChart.chartDiv);

                return div;
            }

            function construct() {
                const container = Ui.div({ style: 'margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column;' });

                const offset = ScoreOffsetCalc.compute(Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish));
                const title = offset ? `${offset.offset.toFixed(2)} ${offset.rerollCount > 1 ? ' (重掷)' : ''}` : '数据不足';

                new CollapseSection({
                    title: `评级偏移: ${title}`,
                    isExpanded: true,
                    content: offsetChartSection(),
                }).mount(container);

                new CollapseSection({
                    title: '重量-评分 拟合',
                    isExpanded: false,
                    content: scoreWeightChartSection(),
                }).mount(container);

                return container;
            }

            function onInit() {
                offsetHistoryChart.init();
                currentOffsetChart.init();
                scoreWeightChart.init();
            }

            return {
                content: construct(),
                onInit: onInit,
            }
        }

        chartPanel() {
            var selector = new FishKeepSelectorUi();
            var timeRange = [0, Infinity];

            var chart = new class {
                chart = null;
                chartDiv = null;
                xRange = [-1, 1];
                yRange = [0, 1];

                filter(fish) {
                    const region = GameData.regionData[fish.region];
                    const limit = region.softLimitWeight;
                    // if (!fish.recorded) return;
                    if (fish.weight < 1) return;

                    if (fish.weight > limit * 0.9) return;
                    if (fish.score <= Utils.eps || fish.score >= 1 - Utils.eps) return;
                    if (fish.weight <= Math.ceil(Range.quantile(GameData.fishData[fish.fishId].weightRange, 0.02) * 100) / 100) return false;
                    return true;
                }

                weightSize(fish) {
                    const t = fish.timePosition;
                    const x = fish.weightRatio;
                    const y = fish.sizeRatio;
                    return [t, Math.log(y) / Math.log(x), fish];
                }

                sizeScore(fish) {
                    const region = GameData.regionData[fish.region];
                    const sizeModifier = region.fishPool[fish.fishId]?.size_modifier ?? 1;
                    const qModifier = 1.8 * (sizeModifier - 1);

                    const t = fish.timePosition;
                    const x = fish.sizeRatio;
                    const y = fish.score;
                    const q = -Utils.erfcInv(2 * y) * Math.SQRT2;

                    // const xExpected = 0.52 + 0.18 * q;
                    const xExpected = 0.52 + 0.18 * (q + qModifier);

                    return [t, x - xExpected, fish];
                }

                weightScore(fish) {
                    const region = GameData.regionData[fish.region];
                    const sizeModifier = region.fishPool[fish.fishId]?.size_modifier ?? 1;
                    const qModifier = 1.8 * (sizeModifier - 1);

                    const t = fish.timePosition;
                    const x = fish.weightRatio;
                    const y = fish.score;
                    const q = -Utils.erfcInv(2 * y) * Math.SQRT2;

                    // const xExpected = 0.52 + 0.18 * q;
                    const xExpected = Math.pow(0.52 + 0.18 * (q + qModifier), 2);

                    return [t, (x - xExpected), fish];
                }

                weightScore2(fish) {
                    const t = fish.timePosition;
                    const w = fish.weightRatio;
                    const q = fish.q;

                    // const xExpected = 0.52 + 0.18 * q;
                    // const xExpected = Math.pow(0.52 + 0.18 * (q + qModifier), 2);

                    return [Math.log(0.52 + 0.18 * q), Math.log(w), fish];
                    // return [(0.52 + 0.18 * q), (w * Math.exp(0.08277)) ** (1 / 2.3), fish];
                }


                getData(fish) {
                    return this.weightScore2(fish);
                }

                getChartOption(colorPalette) {
                    const rawData = Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish);
                    const data = [];
                    rawData.forEach(fish => {
                        const time = new Date(fish.caughtAt);
                        const fishData = GameData.fishData[fish.fishId];
                        if (!fishData) return;
                        if (time < timeRange[0] || time > timeRange[1]) return;

                        data.push({
                            time: time,
                            timePosition: (time - timeRange[0]) / (timeRange[1] - timeRange[0]),
                            fishId: fish.fishId,
                            region: fish.regionId,
                            spotId: fish.spotId,
                            count: 1,
                            weight: fish.weight,
                            weightRatio: Range.position(fishData.weightRange, fish.weight),
                            size: fish.size,
                            sizeRatio: Range.position(fishData.sizeRange, fish.size),
                            score: fish.score / 100,
                            q: Utils.phiInv(fish.score / 100),
                            recorded: fish.fishKeep ? true : false,
                            price: FishKeepHistory.computePriceByFish(fish),
                            exp: FishKeepHistory.computeExpByFish(fish),
                        });
                    });
                    const range = 50, range2 = 30;
                    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; ++i) {
                        let count = 1, tot = 1;
                        for (let j = i > range ? i - range : 0; j < data.length && j <= i + range; ++j) count += data[j].score < data[i].score ? 1 : 0, tot++;
                        data[i].percentage = count / tot;
                        data[i].tmp = -Math.SQRT2 * (Utils.erfcInv(2 * (1 - data[i].percentage)) + Utils.erfcInv(2 * data[i].score))
                    }
                    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; ++i) {
                        let sum = 0, tot = 0;
                        for (let j = i > range2 ? i - range2 : 0; j < data.length && j <= i + range2; ++j) sum += data[j].tmp, tot++;
                        data[i].offset = sum / tot;
                    }

                    const sData = data.filter(i => this.filter(i)).map(i => this.getData(i));
                    dbg(Utils.fitLinear(sData.map(([x, y, _]) => ({ x, y }))));
                    // sData[0][1] = 0;
                    // for (let i = 1; i < sData.length; ++i) {
                    //     sData[i][1] = sData[i - 1][1] + (sData[i][1] - sData[i - 1][1]) * 0.004
                    // }


                    const series = [];
                    series.push({
                        name: '',
                        type: 'scatter',
                        xAxisIndex: 0,
                        yAxisIndex: 0,
                        data: sData,
                        symbolSize: 4,
                        itemStyle: {
                            color: colorPalette[7],
                            opacity: 0.8,
                            borderColor: '#fff',
                            borderWidth: 0.1
                        },
                        animation: false,
                        tooltip: {
                            formatter: (param) => {
                                const fish = param.data[2];
                                const time = Utils.formatDate(fish.time, 'DT');
                                const name = GameData.fishData[fish.fishId].name;
                                const color = param.color;
                                const price = fish.price ? Utils.formatNumber(fish.price.toFixed(0)) : '未知';
                                const exp = fish.exp ? fish.exp.toFixed(1) : '未知';
                                return `<div style="margin: 0px 0 0;line-height:1;"><div style="font-size:14px;color:#6d6e73;font-weight:400;line-height:1;">${time}</div><div style="margin: 10px 0 0;line-height:1;"><div style="margin: 0px 0 0;line-height:1;"><span style="display:inline-block;margin-right:4px;border-radius:10px;width:10px;height:10px;background-color:${color};"></span><span style="font-size:14px;color:#6d6e73;font-weight:900;margin-left:2px;">${name}</span><span style="float:right;margin-left:20px;font-size:14px;color:#6d6e73;font-weight:400;display:flex;flex-direction: column;"><span>${fish.weight.toFixed(3)}kg&nbsp;&nbsp;${fish.score.toFixed(2)}%</span><span style="margin-top:5px;">${Ui.getPriceIcon()}${price}&nbsp;&nbsp;${exp} EXP</span></span><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div>`;
                            }
                        },
                    });

                    series.push({
                        name: '',
                        type: 'line',
                        xAxisIndex: 0,
                        yAxisIndex: 0,
                        data: sData,
                        symbolSize: 4,
                        lineStyle: { width: 2 },
                        showSymbol: false,
                        animation: false,
                    });
                    series.pop();

                    const option = {
                        tooltip: {
                            trigger: 'item',
                        },
                        grid: [{ top: 10, bottom: 60, left: 60, right: 45 }],
                        // dataZoom: [
                        //     {
                        //         type: 'slider',
                        //         xAxisIndex: 0,
                        //         start: 0,
                        //         end: 100,
                        //         bottom: 10,
                        //         left: 58,
                        //         right: 45,
                        //         height: 24,
                        //         filterMode: 'none',
                        //         brushSelect: false,
                        //         showDataShadow: false,
                        //     },
                        //     {
                        //         type: 'inside', // 鼠标滚轮缩放
                        //         xAxisIndex: 0,
                        //     }
                        // ],
                        xAxis: [
                            {
                                type: 'value',
                                // min: this.xRange[0],
                                // max: this.xRange[1],
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            }
                        ],
                        yAxis: [
                            {
                                type: 'value',
                                // min: this.yRange[0],
                                // max: this.yRange[1],
                                gridIndex: 0,
                                splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { type: 'dashed' } }
                            }
                        ],
                        series: series,
                    };
                    return option;
                }
                updateChart() {
                    const colorPalette = [
                        '#E64550', '#F27E52', '#FBC05D', '#91CC75',
                        '#73C0DE', '#5470C6', '#9A60B4', '#949AB3',
                    ];

                    const option = this.getChartOption(colorPalette);
                    this.chart.setOption(option);
                }
                init() {
                    this.chart = echarts.init(this.chartDiv);
                    this.updateChart();
                    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
                        window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (!Array.isArray(entries) || !entries.length) {
                                return;
                            }
                            this.chart.resize();
                        });
                    });
                    observer.observe(this.chartDiv);
                }
            }

            function fishSelectSection() {
                const div = Ui.div({ style: `padding: 15px 0 0;` });

                selector.chartDiv = Ui.div({ style: `height: 165px;` });
                div.appendChild(selector.chartDiv);

                const selectedText = Ui.div({ style: 'padding: 0 10px;' });
                const timeRangeText = Ui.div({ className: 'text-muted', style: 'padding: 0 10px;' });
                selector.on('selected', (range, count) => {
                    timeRange = range;
                    const [minSelected, maxSelected] = range;
                    selectedText.textContent = `已选 ${count} / ${Object.keys(FishKeepHistory.fish).length} 条鱼获数据`;
                    timeRangeText.textContent = `${Utils.formatDate(minSelected, 'Dt')} ~ ${Utils.formatDate(maxSelected, 'Dt')}`;
                });

                div.appendChild(Ui.div({ style: 'padding: 10px; display: flex;' }, [
                    selectedText, Ui.div({ style: 'flex: 1;' }), timeRangeText,
                ]))

                return div;
            }

            function chartSection() {
                const div = Ui.div({ style: `display: flex; height: 100%;` });

                chart.chartDiv = Ui.div({ style: `flex: 1;` });
                div.appendChild(chart.chartDiv);

                selector.on('selected', (range, count) => {
                    timeRange = range;
                    chart.updateChart();
                });

                return div;
            }

            function construct() {
                const container = Ui.div({ style: 'margin: 0 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;' });

                container.appendChild(fishSelectSection());
                container.appendChild(chartSection());

                return container;
            }

            function onInit() {
                chart.init();
                selector.init();
            }

            return {
                content: construct(),
                onInit: onInit,
            }
        }

        showPopup() {
            if (this.popup.isOpening) return;

            this.popup.addTab('历史总览', this.historyPanel(), { overflow: 'hidden', height: '100%' });
            this.popup.addTab('收益统计', this.earningsPanel(), { overflow: 'hidden', height: '100%' });
            this.popup.addTab('鱼护记录', this.recordPanel(), 'overflow: hidden;');
            this.popup.addTab('统计', this.statPanel(), 'overflow: auto;');
            // this.popup.addTab('测试', this.chartPanel(), 'overflow: hidden;');
            this.popup.open();
        }


        constructButton() {
            // 读取用户上次保存的按钮位置，默认在右上角
            const savedLeft = localStorage.getItem('lf_btn_left');
            const savedTop = localStorage.getItem('lf_btn_top') || '10px';
            const initialRight = savedLeft ? 'auto' : '10px';

            const btn = Ui.button('🐟', {
                style: {
                    position: 'fixed',
                    top: savedTop,
                    left: savedLeft || 'auto',
                    right: initialRight,
                    width: '48px',
                    height: '48px',
                    zIndex: '999999',
                    // cursor: 'move',          // 鼠标悬浮显示可移动图标
                    touchAction: 'none',     // 防止手机端拖拽时页面跟着滚动
                    userSelect: 'none'       // 防止拖拽时选中文字
                }
            });

            let isDragging = false;
            let hasMoved = false;
            let startX, startY, startLeft, startTop;

            // 使用 Pointer 事件同时兼容鼠标和手机触控
            btn.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
                if (e.button !== 0 && e.pointerType === 'mouse') return; // 仅响应鼠标左键或触摸
                isDragging = true;
                hasMoved = false;
                startX = e.clientX;
                startY = e.clientY;

                // 将 right 定位转换为 left 定位，方便拖拽计算
                const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
                startLeft = rect.left;
                startTop = rect.top;
                btn.style.right = 'auto';
                btn.style.left = startLeft + 'px';
                btn.style.top = startTop + 'px';

                // 捕获指针，防止鼠标/手指滑动过快脱离按钮
                btn.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
            });

            btn.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
                if (!isDragging) return;
                const dx = e.clientX - startX;
                const dy = e.clientY - startY;

                // 容错处理：移动超过 3 像素才认为是拖拽，防止点击时手指微颤
                if (Math.abs(dx) > 3 || Math.abs(dy) > 3) {
                    hasMoved = true;
                }

                // 计算新位置并限制在屏幕可视范围内（贴边防溢出）
                let newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(startLeft + dx, window.innerWidth - 48));
                let newTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(startTop + dy, window.innerHeight - 48));

                btn.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
                btn.style.top = newTop + 'px';
            });

            btn.addEventListener('pointerup', (e) => {
                if (!isDragging) return;
                isDragging = false;
                btn.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId);

                // 如果发生了拖拽，将最新位置保存到轻量级 localStorage 中
                if (hasMoved) {
                    localStorage.setItem('lf_btn_left', btn.style.left);
                    localStorage.setItem('lf_btn_top', btn.style.top);
                }
            });

            // 点击事件：判断是点击还是拖拽结束
            btn.onclick = (e) => {
                if (hasMoved) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    return; // 如果是拖拽操作，松开时不触发面板打开
                }
                this.showPopup();
            };

            document.documentElement.appendChild(btn);
        }

        constructor() {
            this.constructButton();
        }
    };

    //#endregion



    //#region Data

    const GameData = new class {
        #data = {};

        fishData = {};
        regionData = {};

        fishNameToId = {};

        get data() {
            if (!this.#data) return null;
            return this.#data;
        }

        initFishData() {
            const fishData = this.#data.fish;
            fishData.forEach(fish => {
                const data = {
                    id: fish.id,
                    name: fish.name,
                    rarity: Utils.getFishRarity(fish.rarity),
                    sizeRange: { min: fish.size_min_cm, max: fish.size_max_cm }, // 尺寸, z_f
                    weightRange: { min: fish.weight_min_kg, max: fish.weight_max_kg }, // 体重, m_f
                    strength: fish.strength, // 力量, p_f
                    endurance: fish.endurance, // 耐力, e_f
                    agility: fish.agility, // 敏捷, a_f
                    alertness: fish.alertness, // 警觉, q_f
                    baitPreference: fish.bait_preference, // 偏好饵型, b_f
                    lurePreference: fish.lure_preference,
                    biteHours: fish.bite_hours,
                    waterLayer: fish.water_layer, // 偏好水层, l_f
                    offshorePreference: fish.offshore_preference,
                    migrationHabit: fish.migration_habit, // 洄游习惯, m^{mig}_f
                };
                this.fishData[fish.id] = data;
                this.fishNameToId[fish.name] = fish.id;
            });
        }
        initRegionData() {
            const regions = this.#data.regions;
            regions.forEach(region => {
                const spots = {};
                region.spots.forEach(spot => {
                    spots[spot.id] = {
                        id: spot.id,
                        name: spot.name,
                    };
                });
                const dotPos = region.name.indexOf('·');
                const abbr = dotPos == -1 ? region.name : region.name.slice(0, dotPos);

                const fishPool = {};
                region.fish_pool.forEach(fish => {
                    fishPool[fish.fish_id] = fish;
                })

                const data = {
                    id: region.id,
                    name: region.name,
                    abbr: abbr,
                    spots: spots,
                    fishPool: fishPool,
                    softLimitWeight: region.soft_limit_kg ?? Infinity,
                };
                this.regionData[region.id] = data;
            });
        }
        init(msg) {
            if (!msg) return;
            Object.entries(msg).forEach(([k, v]) => {
                this.#data[k] = v;
                if (k == 'fish') this.initFishData();
                if (k == 'regions') this.initRegionData();
            });
        }

        constructor() {
            this.init(JSON.parse(LZString.decompressFromBase64(DefaultGameDataCompressed)));
            this.init(LocalStorageData.get('gameData'));
            ActionResultHandler.addListener('get_game_data', msg => {
                this.init(msg.data);
                LocalStorageData.set('gameData', this.#data);
                // dbg('Game Data', this.data);
            }, -1000);
            dbg('鱼种数据 (GameData.fishData)', this.fishData);
            dbg('钓场数据 (GameData.regionData)', this.regionData);
        }
    };

    const PlayerData = new class {
        #data = null;

        get data() {
            if (!this.#data) return null;
            return this.#data;
        }

        get playerId() {
            return this.#data?.id;
        }

        get exp() {
            return this.#data?.exp;
        }
        get level() {
            return this.#data?.level;
        }
        get rebirth() {
            return this.#data?.rebirth_count;
        }
        expRequirement(lv) {
            const exp = 25 * Math.pow(1.2, this.rebirth) * Math.pow(lv - 1, 2);
            return exp.toFixed(2);
        }

        update(msg, data) {
            this.#data = data;
        }

        constructor() {
            MessageHandler.addListener('any', msg => {
                if (msg.player) this.update(msg, msg.player);
            }, -100);
        }
    };

    //#endregion


    //#region FishPredictor

    const FishPredictorUi = new class {
        hookResult = null;

        predict() {
            const fish = this.hookResult?.fish;
            const fishStaminaMax = this.hookResult?.fishStaminaMax;
            if (!fish || !fishStaminaMax) return;

            // 鱼最大体力, E_{f,max} = max{5.0, 6.5 e_f + 1.5 m_f + 1.2 a_f}
            const computeStamina = weight => {
                return Math.max(5.0, 6.5 * fish.endurance + 1.5 * weight + 1.2 * fish.agility);
            }
            const wMin = fish.weightRange.min;
            const wMax = fish.weightRange.max;
            const staminaMin = computeStamina(wMin);
            const staminaMax = computeStamina(wMax);
            const pw = (fishStaminaMax - staminaMin) / (staminaMax - staminaMin); // 重量分位
            const weight = Range.quantile(fish.weightRange, pw);

            const predict = FishPredictor.predictByWeight(weight, fish.id, this.hookResult.regionId);

            const ps = Math.pow(pw, 0.531); // 长度分位

            const price = FishKeepHistory.computePrice(fish.id, weight);
            const exp = FishKeepHistory.computeExp(fish.id, weight);
            return {
                reachRegionLimit: predict.reachRegionLimit,
                reachWeightRangeLimit: predict.reachWeightRangeLimit,
                weight: weight,
                size: Range.quantile(fish.sizeRange, ps),
                score: predict.result?.score * 100,
                price: price,
                exp: exp,
                scoreCDF: predict.result?.scoreCDF,
            };
        }

        init(msg) {
            this.hookResult = {
                fish: GameData.fishData[msg.data.fish_id],
                regionId: msg.player.current_region_id,
                seq: msg.data.runtime_seq,
            };
            LocalStorageData.set('last_hooked', this.hookResult);
        }

        reel(data) {
            const round = data.current_round;
            const fishStaminaMax = data.fish_stamina_max; // 鱼体力上限
            const beginSeq = data.runtime_seq - round + 1;
            if (!this.hookResult || this.hookResult.seq != beginSeq) {
                this.hookResult = null;
                return;
            }
            this.hookResult.fishStaminaMax = fishStaminaMax;

            if (round == 1) out(`${this.hookResult.fish.name}: ${this.predict().weight} kg`, this.predict());
            const page = document.querySelector('#root > div > main > div.page-wrapper');
            this.updateUi(page);
        }

        updateUi(page) {
            let statusCard = null;
            if (!page?.children) return;
            for (const child of page.children) {
                if (!child.textContent.includes('实时状态')) continue;
                statusCard = child;
                break;
            }
            if (!statusCard) return;
            if (statusCard.lastChild.id == 'fish-predictor') return;

            const info = this.predict();
            if (!info) return;

            const div = Ui.div({ id: 'fish-predictor', className: 'fishing-metric-card', style: 'margin-top:4px' });

            // 达到软上限
            if (info.reachRegionLimit) {
                div.appendChild(Ui.div({
                    textContent:
                        `${this.hookResult.fish.name}: ${info.weight.toFixed(2)} kg (接近区域软上限)`
                }));
                statusCard.appendChild(div);
                return;
            }

            const price = info.price ?? 0;
            const exp = info.exp ?? 0;
            const predict = [
                [`经验宝宝`, price * 0.2, exp * 10, info.scoreCDF(0.02)],
                [`不达标`, price * 0.2, exp * 0.82, info.scoreCDF(0.35) - info.scoreCDF(0.02)],
                [`达标`, price * 1, exp * 1, info.scoreCDF(0.95) - info.scoreCDF(0.35)],
                [`稀有`, price * 2, exp * 1.28, info.scoreCDF(0.99) - info.scoreCDF(0.95)],
                [`罕见`, price * 5, exp * 1.7, info.scoreCDF(0.9995) - info.scoreCDF(0.99)],
                [`传说`, price * 10, exp * 2, 1 - info.scoreCDF(0.9995)],
            ].sort((a, b) => b[3] - a[3]);
            let stat = '';
            if (info.reachWeightRangeLimit == -1) stat = ' (最小)';
            if (info.reachWeightRangeLimit == 1) stat = ' (最大)';
            div.appendChild(Ui.div({
                textContent:
                    `${this.hookResult.fish.name}: ${info.weight.toFixed(2)} kg, 估计 ${info.size.toFixed(1)} cm, ${info.score.toFixed(2)}%${stat}`
            }));
            for (let p of predict) {
                const [rarity, price, exp, pr] = p;
                if (pr < 0.001) break;
                div.appendChild(Ui.div({
                    textContent:
                        `${(pr * 100).toFixed(1)}% ${rarity}: 价格 ${info.price ? price.toFixed(0) : '未知'}, 经验 ${info.exp ? exp.toFixed(1) : '未知'}`
                }));
            }
            statusCard.appendChild(div);
        }

        observe() {
            const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
                mutations.forEach(mutation => {
                    mutation.addedNodes.forEach(addedNode => {
                        const classList = addedNode.classList;
                        if (!classList) return;
                        if (classList.contains('page-wrapper')) {
                            this.updateUi(addedNode);
                        }
                    });
                });
            });

            const body = document.body;
            observer.observe(body, {
                childList: true,
                subtree: true,
            });
        }

        constructor() {
            this.hookResult = LocalStorageData.get('last_hooked');
            this.observe();
        }
    };

    const FishingTickHandler = new class {
        onHooked(msg) {
            if (msg.data.outcome == 'hooked') {
                FishPredictorUi.init(msg);
            }
        }

        onReeling(data) {
            FishPredictorUi.reel(data);
        }

        constructor() {
            MessageHandler.addListener('hook_result', msg => {
                this.onHooked(msg);
            });
            MessageHandler.addListener('fishing_tick', msg => {
                const state = msg.data.state;
                if (state == 'REELING') this.onReeling(msg.data);
            });
        }
    };

    //#endregion

    //#region Boat

    const rebirthStyle = [
        'color: rgb(248, 250, 252); text-shadow: rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) 1px 0px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) -1px 0px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) 0px 1px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) 0px -1px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) 1px 1px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) -1px 1px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) 1px -1px 0px, rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4) -1px -1px 0px;', // 0
        'color: rgb(125, 211, 252);', // 1
        'color: rgb(134, 239, 172);', // 2
        'color: rgb(253, 230, 138);', // 3
        'color: rgb(252, 165, 165);', // 4
        'color: rgb(147, 197, 253);', // 5
        'color: rgb(196, 181, 253);', // 6
        'color: rgb(253, 186, 116);', // 7
        'color: rgb(249, 168, 212);', // 8
        'color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 1px 0px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) -1px 0px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 0px 1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 0px -1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 1px 1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) -1px 1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 1px -1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) -1px -1px 0px, rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.9) 0px 0px 7px, rgba(253, 224, 71, 0.55) 0px 0px 14px;', // 9
    ];
    const shadow = (color) => {
        return `text-shadow: ${color} 1px 0px 0px, ${color} -1px 0px 0px, ${color} 0px 1px 0px, ${color} 0px -1px 0px, ${color} 1px 1px 0px, ${color} -1px 1px 0px, ${color} 1px -1px 0px, ${color} -1px -1px 0px;`
    }
    const rebirthStyleCustom = [
        `color: rgb(248, 250, 252); ${shadow('rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.4)')}`, // 0
        `color: rgb(125, 211, 252); ${shadow('rgba(73, 121, 144, 0.4)')}`, // 1
        `color: rgb(134, 239, 172); ${shadow('rgba(83, 147, 106, 0.4)')}`, // 2
        `color: rgb(253, 230, 138); ${shadow('rgba(150, 138, 81, 0.4)')}`, // 3
        `color: rgb(252, 165, 165); ${shadow('rgba(140, 91, 91, 0.4)')}`, // 4
        `color: rgb(147, 197, 253); ${shadow('rgba(92, 123, 159, 0.4)')}`, // 5
        `color: rgb(196, 181, 253); ${shadow('rgba(114, 105, 147, 0.4)')}`, // 6
        `color: rgb(253, 186, 116); ${shadow('rgba(149, 110, 68, 0.4)')}`, // 7
        `color: rgb(249, 168, 212); ${shadow('rgba(141, 94, 120, 0.4)')}`, // 8
        'color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 1px 0px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) -1px 0px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 0px 1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 0px -1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 1px 1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) -1px 1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) 1px -1px 0px, rgba(8, 47, 73, 0.2) -1px -1px 0px, rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.9) 0px 0px 7px, rgba(253, 224, 71, 0.55) 0px 0px 14px;', // 9
    ];

    const BoatHelper = new class {
        voyage = null;
        playerInfo = null;

        load() {
            this.playerInfo = LocalStorageData.get('player-info') ?? {};
        }

        save() {
            LocalStorageData.set('player-info', this.playerInfo);
        }

        handlePlayersMsg(players) {
            const rodTypeMap = {
                'hand': '手竿',
                'match': '赛竿',
                'bottom': '底钓',
                'lure': '路亚',
                'iso': '矶竿',
            }
            players.forEach(p => {
                let rodType = '未知';
                const loadout = p.loadout;
                if (!loadout) return;
                if (loadout.lure) rodType = '路亚';
                Object.entries(rodTypeMap).forEach(([k, v]) => {
                    if (loadout.rod.includes(k)) rodType = v;
                });
                this.playerInfo[p.id] = {
                    ...(this.playerInfo[p.id] ?? { fav: false, }),
                    name: p.name,
                    rebirthCount: p.rebirth_count,
                    rodType: rodType,
                };
            });
            this.save();
        }

        getMembers() {
            const members = {};
            const idToOrder = {};
            this.voyage.members.forEach((m, idx) => {
                idToOrder[m.player_id] = idx;
                members[idx] = {
                    order: idx,
                    name: m.username,
                    id: m.player_id,
                    isCaptain: m.is_captain,
                    totalWeight: m.total_weight_kg,
                    catchCount: m.catch_count,
                    lockedFish: [],
                }
            });
            this.voyage.locked_signals?.entries?.forEach(i => {
                const idx = idToOrder[i.locked_by_player_id];
                members[idx]?.lockedFish?.push(i.fish_id);
            });
            return members;
        }

        handleFishGrid(fishGrid) {
            if (!fishGrid || !this.voyage) return;
            const fishList = [];
            fishGrid.childNodes.forEach(node => {
                const fishNameNode = node.querySelector('div.region-fish-card-stack > button.region-fish-card-content > div > div.item-name');
                const fishId = GameData.fishNameToId[fishNameNode.textContent];
                const price = FishKeepHistory.computeRefPrice(fishId);
                const exp = FishKeepHistory.computeRefExp(fishId);
                fishList.push({
                    name: fishNameNode.textContent,
                    fishId: fishId,
                    price: price,
                    exp: exp,
                });

                const content = node.querySelector('div.region-fish-card-stack > button.region-fish-card-content');
                content.appendChild(Ui.div({
                    className: 'text-xs text-muted',
                }, [
                    Ui.elem('span', { innerHTML: Ui.getPriceIcon(12, 10) }),
                    Ui.elem('span', { textContent: price ? Utils.formatNumber(price.toFixed(0)) : '未知' }),
                ]));
                content.appendChild(Ui.div({
                    className: 'text-xs text-muted',
                }, [
                    Ui.elem('span', { textContent: 'EXP ' }),
                    Ui.elem('span', { textContent: exp ? exp.toFixed(1) : '未知' }),
                ]));
            });
        }

        handleMemberList(container) {
            if (!container || !this.voyage) return;
            const members = this.getMembers();

            container.childNodes.forEach((node, idx) => {
                const header = node.querySelector('div.item-header');
                if (!header?.firstChild) return;
                header.style = 'display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 2px; flex-wrap: wrap;';
                header.firstChild.style = 'flex: 1;';
                header.firstChild.firstChild.classList.remove('item-name--multiline');

                const member = members[idx];
                if (!member) return;
                member.node = [...node.childNodes];

                // 名字不对
                const memberNameNode = header.firstChild.querySelector('span.item-name');
                if (!memberNameNode.textContent.includes(member.name)) return;

                const favBtn = Ui.elem('span', { style: 'margin-left: 2px; cursor: pointer;', innerHTML: Ui.getFavIcon() });
                memberNameNode.appendChild(favBtn);
                let isFav = this.playerInfo[member.id]?.fav ?? false;
                const setFav = () => {
                    (this.playerInfo[member.id] ??= {}).fav = isFav;
                    favBtn.style.color = isFav ? '#d4a017' : '#000';
                    favBtn.firstChild.style.fill = isFav ? 'currentColor' : 'white';
                };
                setFav();
                favBtn.onclick = () => {
                    isFav = !isFav;
                    setFav();
                    this.save();
                };

                // 把名字颜色改成转生次数
                const rebirth = this.playerInfo[member.id]?.rebirthCount ?? -1;
                if (rebirth >= 0) header.firstChild.firstChild.style = rebirthStyleCustom[rebirth];

                // 添加鱼竿类型
                const stat = header.firstChild.querySelector('div.inline-meta.mt-xs');
                stat.style.marginLeft = '5px';
                const rodType = this.playerInfo[member.id]?.rodType;
                if (rodType) {
                    stat.textContent = `${rodType} · ` + stat.textContent;
                }

                // 添加锁鱼信息
                if (member.lockedFish?.length) {
                    const lockedFishItems = [];
                    member.lockedFish.forEach(fishId => {
                        const item = Ui.elem('span', { style: 'background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-bg) 60%, transparent); border: 1px solid var(--color-text); border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 6px;' });
                        item.textContent = GameData.fishData[fishId]?.name ?? fishId;
                        lockedFishItems.push(item);
                    });
                    header.appendChild(Ui.div({ style: 'font-size: 9px; display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 5px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap; flex-wrap: wrap;' }, [
                        Ui.elem('span', { style: 'font-size: 11px;' }, '🔒'),
                        ...lockedFishItems,
                    ]));
                }
            });

            // 按总重量排序
            const getColor = x => {
                const h = x * 100;
                const s = 65;
                const l = 87;
                return `hsl(${h}, ${s}%, ${l}%)`
            }
            container.innerHTML = '';
            const sortedMemberList = Object.values(members).sort((a, b) => {
                return b.totalWeight - a.totalWeight;
            });
            const weightRange = {
                min: sortedMemberList.at(-1).totalWeight * 0.95,
                max: sortedMemberList[0].totalWeight,
            }
            sortedMemberList.forEach((m, idx) => {
                const isMe = m.id === PlayerData.playerId;
                const isFav = this.playerInfo[m.id]?.fav ?? false;
                const x = Range.position(weightRange, m.totalWeight);
                const position = x * 100;
                const newNode = Ui.div({ className: 'card item-card', style: `display: flex; align-items: center; background-origin: border-box;` }, [
                    Ui.div({ className: 'ranking-rank', style: `margin-right: 6px; ${isMe ? 'color: var(--color-primary);' : ''}` }, `#${idx + 1}`),
                    Ui.div({ style: 'flex: 1;' }, m.node),
                ]);
                if (isMe) {
                    const myColor = 'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary) 5%, var(--color-bg))';
                    newNode.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(to right, ${getColor(x)} ${position}%, ${myColor} ${position}%)`;
                    newNode.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-primary)';
                    newNode.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary) 26%, transparent)';
                } else if (isFav) {
                    const myColor = 'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-warning) 5%, var(--color-bg))';
                    newNode.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(to right, ${getColor(x)} ${position}%, ${myColor} ${position}%)`;
                    newNode.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-warning)';
                    newNode.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-warning) 26%, transparent)';
                } else {
                    newNode.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(to right, ${getColor(x)} ${position}%, var(--color-bg) ${position}%)`;
                }
                newNode.style.backgroundOrigin = 'border-box';
                container.appendChild(newNode);
            });
        }

        observe() {
            const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
                mutations.forEach(mutation => {
                    mutation.addedNodes.forEach(addedNode => {
                        const memberList = addedNode.querySelector?.('div.card-list.mt-md.mb-sm') ?? addedNode;
                        if (!memberList || memberList.className !== 'card-list mt-md mb-sm') return;
                        const captainName = memberList.firstChild?.querySelector?.('div.item-header > div > span.item-name.item-name--multiline')?.textContent;
                        if (!captainName?.includes('掌舵') && !captainName?.includes('船主')) return;

                        const fishGrid = addedNode.querySelector?.('div.region-fish-grid');
                        this.handleFishGrid(fishGrid);
                        this.handleMemberList(memberList);
                    });
                });
            });

            const body = document.body;
            observer.observe(body, {
                childList: true,
                subtree: true,
            });
        }

        constructor() {
            this.load();
            ActionResultHandler.addListener('get_boat_state', msg => {
                const voyage = msg.data?.active_voyage;
                if (!voyage) return;
                this.voyage = voyage;
            });
            ActionResultHandler.addListener('boat_voyage_update', msg => {
                const voyage = msg.data?.active_voyage;
                if (!voyage) return;
                this.voyage = voyage;
            });
            ActionResultHandler.addListener('get_pond_view', msg => {
                const players = msg.data?.players;
                if (!players) return;
                this.handlePlayersMsg(players);
            });
            this.observe();
        }
    };

    //#endregion

    //#region ExpCalculator

    const ExpCalculator = new class {
        crucialLvs = [7, 14, 20, 27, 32, 35, 40, 55, 90, 120, 150, 200];

        updateUi() {
            const panel = document.body.querySelector('#root > div > aside > div.sidebar-footer > div.player-info');
            if (!panel) return;
            const existing = panel.querySelector('#exp-requirement');
            if (existing) existing.remove();

            const level = PlayerData.level;
            const targetLevel = this.crucialLvs.find(i => i > level);
            if (targetLevel) {
                const exp = PlayerData.expRequirement(targetLevel) - PlayerData.exp;
                panel.appendChild(Ui.div({ className: 'player-info player-level', id: 'exp-requirement' }, [
                    Ui.elem('span', {}, `距离 Lv.${targetLevel} 还差 ${Math.ceil(exp)} EXP`)
                ]));
            }
        }

        observe() {
            const observer = new MutationObserver(Utils.debounce((mutations) => {
                mutations.forEach(mutation => {
                    mutation.addedNodes.forEach(addedNode => {
                        const classList = addedNode.classList;
                        if (!classList) return;
                        if (classList.contains('player-info')) {
                            this.updateUi();
                        }
                    });
                });
            }));

            const body = document.body;
            observer.observe(body, {
                childList: true,
                subtree: true,
            });
        }

        constructor() {
            MessageHandler.addListener('any', msg => {
                if (msg.player) this.updateUi();
            });
            this.observe();
        }
    };

    //#endregion






    const Simulator = new class {
        run() {
            const regionId = 'stormline_reef'; // 爆线
            // const regionId = 'hadal_canyon_gate'; // 渊门
            FishKeepHistory.save();
            FishKeepHistory.recomputeFishInfo();
            const fish = Object.values(FishKeepHistory.fish)
                .sort((a, b) => b.caughtAt - a.caughtAt)
                .slice(0, 3000)
                .filter(a => a.regionId == regionId);
            const limit = GameData.regionData[regionId].softLimitWeight;
            const duration = (fish.at(0).caughtAt - fish.at(-1).caughtAt) / Utils.msPerH;

            dbg(duration, fish.length / duration)
            const simulate = (reroll, baby) => {
                return fish.reduce((pre, a) => {
                    let s = Math.random() ** (1 / (reroll + 1));
                    const w = FishPredictor.predictByScore(s * 100).weightRatio;
                    if (baby && s <= 0.05) s = 0.01;
                    const weight = Math.min(Range.quantile(GameData.fishData[a.fishId].weightRange, w), limit);
                    const exp = FishKeepHistory.computeExp(a.fishId, weight, s * 100);
                    return pre + exp;
                }, 0) / duration;
            }

            const T = 100;
            let reroll = 0, baby = 0;
            for (let i = 0; i < T; ++i) {
                reroll += simulate(1, 0);
                baby += simulate(0, 1);
            }
            dbg(reroll / 100, baby / 100)
            dbg(reroll / baby)
        }
    };




    dbg(`加载用时 ${Date.now() - __beginTime}ms`)
